# Songwriting & AI Music Reference

## Song Structure
```
Intro → Verse → Chorus → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
```

## Suno AI Prompt Tags
```
[Genre: pop], [Style: upbeat], [Key: C major]
[Tempo: 120 BPM], [Instruments: guitar, drums, synth]
```

## Best Practices
- Start with a strong hook/melody
- Keep verses narrative, choruses emotional
- Use dynamics (quiet verse → loud chorus)
- AI music: be specific about genre and mood
